MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-09-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day and heard in Room 503A. Pro Tem Judge: Roger Rubin, Clerks: P. Dias/D. Carter. No reporter present. The case settled per written stipulation, not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
